mapper.select: SELECT A.* , (SELECT C.CAT_NM FROM TB_PROP_CATEGORY C WHERE C.CAT_CD = A.CAT_CD AND C.SUB_CAT_CD = '00') AS CAT_NM , (SELECT C.CAT_NM FROM TB_PROP_CATEGORY C WHERE C.CAT_CD = A.CAT_CD AND C.SUB_CAT_CD = A.SUB_CAT_CD) AS SUB_CAT_NM , DATE_FORMAT(A.RGT_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS RGT_DTM_FMT , DATE_FORMAT(A.UPD_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS UPD_DTM_FMT FROM TB_PROPERTY A WHERE A.PROP_CD = #{propCd} AND A.DEL_YN = 'N'
mapper.update:
INSERT INTO TB_PROPERTY ( PROP_CD, CAT_CD, SUB_CAT_CD, DEAL_TYPE, PROP_NM, PROP_FEATURE, ADDRESS, ADDRESS_DTL, BUILDING_NM, LAT, LNG, SELL_PRICE, DEPOSIT, MONTHLY_RENT, LOAN_YN, LOAN_AMOUNT, PREMIUM, MONTHLY_MGMT, AREA_SUPPLY, AREA_EXCLUSIVE, AREA_LAND, FLOOR_NO, FLOOR_TOTAL, ROOM_CNT, BATH_CNT, DIRECTION, PARKING_YN, BUILD_DATE, ENTRANCE_TYPE, HEATING, DETAIL_CNTS, ATCH_FILE_KEY, DISPLAY_YN, DISPLAY_START, DISPLAY_END, BADGE_TYPE, SOLD_YN, ADMIN_MEMO, USE_YN, DEL_YN, RGT_USR_CD, RGT_DTM, UPD_USR_CD, UPD_DTM ) VALUES ( #{propCd}, #{catCd}, #{subCatCd}, #{dealType}, #{propNm}, #{propFeature}, #{address}, #{addressDtl}, #{buildingNm}, #{lat}, #{lng}, #{sellPrice}, #{deposit}, #{monthlyRent}, #{loanYn}, #{loanAmount}, #{premium}, #{monthlyMgmt}, #{areaSupply}, #{areaExclusive}, #{areaLand}, #{floorNo}, #{floorTotal}, #{roomCnt}, #{bathCnt}, #{direction}, #{parkingYn}, #{buildDate}, #{entranceType}, #{heating}, #{detailCnts}, #{atchFileKey}, #{displayYn}, #{displayStart}, #{displayEnd}, #{badgeType}, #{soldYn}, #{adminMemo}, 'Y', 'N', #{ssnUsrCd}, NOW(), #{ssnUsrCd}, NOW() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE CAT_CD = #{catCd}, SUB_CAT_CD = #{subCatCd}, DEAL_TYPE = #{dealType}, PROP_NM = #{propNm}, PROP_FEATURE = #{propFeature}, ADDRESS = #{address}, ADDRESS_DTL = #{addressDtl}, BUILDING_NM = #{buildingNm}, LAT = #{lat}, LNG = #{lng}, SELL_PRICE = #{sellPrice}, DEPOSIT = #{deposit}, MONTHLY_RENT = #{monthlyRent}, LOAN_YN = #{loanYn}, LOAN_AMOUNT = #{loanAmount}, PREMIUM = #{premium}, MONTHLY_MGMT = #{monthlyMgmt}, AREA_SUPPLY = #{areaSupply}, AREA_EXCLUSIVE = #{areaExclusive}, AREA_LAND = #{areaLand}, FLOOR_NO = #{floorNo}, FLOOR_TOTAL = #{floorTotal}, ROOM_CNT = #{roomCnt}, BATH_CNT = #{bathCnt}, DIRECTION = #{direction}, PARKING_YN = #{parkingYn}, BUILD_DATE = #{buildDate}, ENTRANCE_TYPE = #{entranceType}, HEATING = #{heating}, DETAIL_CNTS = #{detailCnts},
ATCH_FILE_KEY = #{atchFileKey},
DISPLAY_YN = #{displayYn}, DISPLAY_START = #{displayStart}, DISPLAY_END = #{displayEnd}, BADGE_TYPE = #{badgeType}, SOLD_YN = #{soldYn}, ADMIN_MEMO = #{adminMemo}, UPD_USR_CD = #{ssnUsrCd}, UPD_DTM = NOW()
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_PROPERTY ( PROP_CD, CAT_CD, SUB_CAT_CD, DEAL_TYPE, PROP_NM, PROP_FEATURE, ADDRESS, ADDRESS_DTL, BUILDING_NM, LAT, LNG, SELL_PRICE, DEPOSIT, MONTHLY_RENT, LOAN_YN, LOAN_AMOUNT, PREMIUM, MONTHLY_MGMT, AREA_SUPPLY, AREA_EXCLUSIVE, AREA_LAND, FLOOR_NO, FLOOR_TOTAL, ROOM_CNT, BATH_CNT, DIRECTION, PARKING_YN, BUILD_DATE, ENTRANCE_TYPE, HEATING, DETAIL_CNTS, DISPLAY_YN, BADGE_TYPE, SOLD_YN, USE_YN, DEL_YN, VIEW_CNT, RGT_USR_CD, RGT_DTM, UPD_USR_CD, UPD_DTM ) SELECT #{newPropCd}, CAT_CD, SUB_CAT_CD, DEAL_TYPE, CONCAT(PROP_NM, '_복사본'), PROP_FEATURE, ADDRESS, ADDRESS_DTL, BUILDING_NM, LAT, LNG, SELL_PRICE, DEPOSIT, MONTHLY_RENT, LOAN_YN, LOAN_AMOUNT, PREMIUM, MONTHLY_MGMT, AREA_SUPPLY, AREA_EXCLUSIVE, AREA_LAND, FLOOR_NO, FLOOR_TOTAL, ROOM_CNT, BATH_CNT, DIRECTION, PARKING_YN, BUILD_DATE, ENTRANCE_TYPE, HEATING, DETAIL_CNTS, 'N', BADGE_TYPE, 'N', 'Y', 'N', 0, #{ssnUsrCd}, NOW(), #{ssnUsrCd}, NOW() FROM TB_PROPERTY WHERE PROP_CD = #{propCd}
mapper.select: SELECT CAT_CD, CAT_NM FROM TB_PROP_CATEGORY WHERE SUB_CAT_CD = '00' AND USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY SORT_ORDER
SELECT SUB_CAT_CD, CAT_NM FROM TB_PROP_CATEGORY WHERE CAT_CD = #{catCd} AND SUB_CAT_CD != '00' AND USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY SORT_ORDER
